name: Pineapple Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork loin or rib chops, lean
recipeInstructions:
Note: Choose approximately half-inch thick chops. Pineapple should be sliced, packed in juice, and drained, reserving the juice.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Trim fat from chops and lightly sprinkle both sides with salt.
3. Place chops in an ungreased 8x8x2 inch baking dish.
4. Mix brown sugar with 2 tbsp of reserved pineapple juice and nutmeg.
5. Spoon half the mixture over the pork.
6. Top pork with pineapple slices.
7. Cover with remaining brown sugar mix.
8. Bake for 30 minutes, then uncover and bake until done (15-20 more minutes), occasionally spooning sauce over pork.
9. Garnish with snipped chives if desired.
